title: {name} und die Muellabfuhr
moral: Community helpers keep our world clean — everyone can help the environment

beats.beat: Title page — {name} waving at a big orange garbage truck on the street
Early morning — {name} wakes up to a loud rumbling sound outside in {city}
Running to the window in pajamas — the garbage truck is coming down the street
{name} watches the big mechanical arm grab a bin and tip it — fascinated
Begging {parent} to go outside — quickly getting dressed, grabbing {companion}
Standing on the sidewalk — the truck is huge up close, yellow lights flashing
The driver notices {name} and waves from the cab — big friendly smile
The driver climbs down and introduces himself — his name is Max
Max shows {name} the truck controls — buttons, levers, the big steering wheel
Max explains where the garbage goes — to a big sorting facility
{name} learns about recycling — paper in blue, plastic in yellow, compost in brown
Max lets {name} press the button that lifts a bin — the arm swings up
{name} helps push a neighbor's bin to the curb — feeling strong and helpful
Max honks the horn for {name} — the deep sound echoes through the street
Other kids from the street come to watch — {name} explains how recycling works
Max gives {name} a mini garbage truck sticker — {name} puts it on {companion}
The truck moves to the next street — {name} waves goodbye to Max
{name} and {parent} walk home — {name} chatters about everything learned
At home — {name} checks which bin the yogurt cup goes in (yellow!)
{name} helps sort the household recycling — paper here, plastic there
Drawing a picture of the garbage truck with Max in the driver's seat
Telling the family about recycling at dinner — everyone listens
{name} puts the drawing on the fridge — 'I want to be like Max when I grow up'
Bedtime — {name} holds {companion} with the sticker, dreams of driving a big truck

vocabulary_constraints.toddler: max 8 words per sentence, 3-4 sentences per page
vocabulary_constraints.preschool: max 12 words per sentence, 4-5 sentences per page
vocabulary_constraints.early-reader: max 15 words per sentence, 5-7 sentences per page
